source.scope: Official-source-backed Portugal calendar-year 2026 separate and joint IRS with additional solidarity rate.

PT.notes: Separate and joint annual IRS under the 2026 nine-band general scale and article 68-A solidarity rate on caller-confirmed taxable income. Deductions, minimum-existence protections and special schedules remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 separate and joint general IRS plus additional solidarity rate.
